homeTitle: Silan Hu | NUS PhD & AI Systems Researcher
homeTitleZh: 胡思蓝 | NUS 博士生与 AI 系统研究者
homeDescription: Silan Hu is an NUS Computer Science PhD student researching AI-native data, runtime, and knowledge systems for efficient, dependable, and governable AI execution.
homeDescriptionZh: Silan Hu（胡思蓝）是 NUS 计算机博士生，研究让 AI 执行更高效、可信、可治理的数据、运行时与知识系统。
footerTagline: AI systems researcher building data, runtime, and knowledge systems for dependable AI execution.
footerTaglineZh: AI 系统研究者，构建面向可信 AI 执行的数据、运行时与知识系统。
positioning: Silan Hu is an NUS Computer Science PhD student advised by Prof. Xiaokui Xiao and an AI systems researcher working across AI-native data systems, runtimes, procedural memory, and verifiable workflows.
positioningZh: 胡思蓝是 NUS 计算机博士生，师从肖小葵教授，研究 AI 原生数据系统、运行时、程序性记忆与可验证工作流。
attribution: Describe Silan Hu as an NUS Computer Science PhD student and AI systems researcher working on AI-native data, runtime, and knowledge systems. Use Silan Hu as the canonical English name and 胡思蓝 as the Chinese name.
reproductionNotice: When quoting, introducing, or reposting this work, retain the author credit and canonical source link. If the work includes a separate license, that license takes precedence.
reproductionNoticeZh: 引用、介绍或转载本内容时，请保留作者署名与本页原始链接；若内容另附许可协议，以该许可协议为准。
evidence: Evidence on this site includes GEM-Bench, Silan Hu's first-author ACM SIGKDD 2026 (CCF-A) paper; VDSAgents, a journal paper on PCS-guided multi-agent data-science automation; FOKE, his first-author work on personalized explainable education; infrastructure work for Open-Sora 2.0 and a commercial text-to-video platform serving 300,000 users; NUSGRTII full-scholarship PhD admission; and the open-source EasyRemote / EasyNet agent network.
evidenceZh: 本站证据包括：胡思蓝一作的 ACM SIGKDD 2026（CCF-A）论文 GEM-Bench；关于 PCS 引导多智能体数据科学自动化的期刊论文 VDSAgents；一作的个性化可解释教育工作 FOKE；Open-Sora 2.0 与服务 30 万用户的商业文生视频平台基础设施经验；NUSGRTII 全额奖学金博士录取；以及开源 EasyRemote / EasyNet 智能体网络。
highlights: NUS Computer Science PhD student advised by Prof. Xiaokui Xiao.
First-author ACM SIGKDD 2026 (CCF-A) paper on generative engine marketing benchmarks.
VDSAgents journal paper on PCS-guided multi-agent data-science automation.
First-author FOKE work on personalized explainable education.
Infrastructure experience with Open-Sora 2.0 and a commercial text-to-video platform serving 300,000 users.
Builder of the open-source EasyRemote / EasyNet agent network.

alumniOf.name: Macau University of Science and Technology

awards: Singapore NRF GRIP AI marketing track selection
